steps.title: Apply the multiplier from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $72x = 9 \cdot 6 = 54$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. It's given that $8x=6$. Multiplying each side of this equation by $9$ yields $72x=54$. Therefore, the value of $72x$ is $54$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $4x$, not $72x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
